doctorHeader.description: A refined overview of your practice, conversations, and upcoming activity.

doctorLikes.title: Patient likes
doctorLikes.description: See how many patients currently have your doctor profile saved to their favourites.
doctorLikes.summary: {count, plural, =0 {No patients have saved your profile yet.} one {# patient has saved your profile.} other {# patients have saved your profile.}}
doctorLikes.currentMetricDescription: This number reflects patients who currently have your profile in their favourites. Removing it from their favourites will reduce the total.

doctorReviews.title: Your reviews
doctorReviews.description: See feedback collected through Esthetic Match alongside the latest review information available from your connected Google Business Profile.
doctorReviews.reviewCount: {count, plural, =0 {No reviews} one {# review} other {# reviews}}
doctorReviews.googleReviewCount: {count, plural, =0 {No Google reviews} one {# Google review} other {# Google reviews}}
doctorReviews.ratingBreakdownDescription: This distribution includes only reviews submitted directly through Esthetic Match.
doctorReviews.googleReviewsDescription: Written reviews supplied by Google for the doctor’s connected place.
doctorReviews.emptyDescription: Patient reviews submitted through Esthetic Match will appear here.
doctorReviews.googleNotConnectedDescription: Add a valid Google Place ID to this doctor profile to display its Google rating and written reviews.
doctorReviews.googleNoWrittenReviewsDescription: Google did not return written reviews for this place.
doctorReviews.googleSummaryOnlyDescription: The saved Google rating and review total are shown, but written reviews could not be refreshed from Google.

reviewInvitations.title: Create a review invitation
reviewInvitations.description: Choose the doctor who will receive the review, optionally select a patient, then email or copy a secure one-time link.
reviewInvitations.doctorLoadError: Could not load the available doctors.
reviewInvitations.emptyDoctorsDescription: Doctor profiles created in Esthetic Match will appear here.
reviewInvitations.noDoctorResultsDescription: Try a different doctor, clinic or location.
reviewInvitations.patientRequired: Select a patient to send an email invitation.
reviewInvitations.patientOptional: Optional when generating a link only.
reviewInvitations.patientSearchPlaceholder: Search patients by name or email
reviewInvitations.patientLoadError: Could not load the available patients.
reviewInvitations.patientAccessRequired: Sign in to view and select patients.
reviewInvitations.emptyPatientsDescription: Patient accounts created in Esthetic Match will appear here.
reviewInvitations.noPatientResultsDescription: Try a different patient name or email.
reviewInvitations.emailAndLinkDescription: The selected patient receives the private link by email. The same link remains available to copy.
reviewInvitations.linkOnlyDescription: Generate the link without sending an email. A patient is optional.
reviewInvitations.doctorSelectionRequired: Select the doctor who should receive the review.
reviewInvitations.patientSelectionRequired: Select the patient who should receive the invitation.
reviewInvitations.genericLinkDescription: The first signed-in patient who submits the review will claim this link.
reviewInvitations.selectDoctorError: Select a doctor before creating the invitation.
reviewInvitations.selectPatientError: Select a patient before sending an email invitation.
reviewInvitations.sendError: The invitation email could not be sent.
reviewInvitations.generateError: The private review link could not be generated.
reviewInvitations.copyError: The link could not be copied.
reviewInvitations.emailSuccessDescription: The private invitation was sent to {email}. You may also copy the same link below.
reviewInvitations.restrictedLinkSuccessDescription: The link is restricted to the selected patient. No email was sent.
reviewInvitations.genericLinkSuccessDescription: The link can be shared manually and used once by a signed-in patient.
reviewInvitations.restrictedSecurityNote: A patient-specific link is tied to the selected account and can only be used once.
reviewInvitations.genericSecurityNote: A generic link requires a signed-in patient and can only be used once.
